recent_facts.title: The Coin Flip Trap
recent_facts.body:
Someone approaches you with a deal:

Flip 1: Heads → you win $1,000 | Tails → you pay $500
Flip 2: Heads → you win $2,000 | Tails → you pay $1,000
Flip 3: Heads → you win $4,000 | Tails → you pay $2,000
...and so on, doubling each time.

The catch: the moment you lose, the game ends and you pay. You can walk away after any win.

🤔 At what point do you walk away?
